g.text: Slot Creation and Modification - Full Sequence
[Initiator lacks Write permission OR not in accessible set]
[Initiator has Write permission and is accessible]
Display error: "Slot overlaps with existing slot"
[Initiator lacks Write permission OR not in accessible set]
[Initiator has Write permission and is accessible]
Display error: "Modified slot overlaps with existing slot"
State remains Post1 (or Pre1 if no slots before? - invariant ensures at least one)
